app.name: Pregnancy Toolkits
app.title: Your Complete
app.description: 34 professional tools for your pregnancy journey — from fertility to postpartum care.
app.noToolsFound: No tools found matching your search.

app.footer: For informational purposes only. Always consult your healthcare provider.

pregnancyAssistant.title: Smart Pregnancy Guide
pregnancyAssistant.description: Ask any pregnancy question and get instant answers.

symptomAnalyzer.title: Smart Symptom Analysis
symptomAnalyzer.description: Analyze your symptoms with intelligent insights.

aiMealSuggestion.title: Smart Meal Planner
aiMealSuggestion.description: Get personalized meal suggestions for your trimester.

weeklySummary.title: Weekly Insights
weeklySummary.description: Smart weekly updates on your baby's growth.

aiBirthPlan.title: AI Birth Plan Generator
aiBirthPlan.description: Create your personalized birth plan with AI guidance.

aiBabyNameFinder.title: AI Baby Name Finder
aiBabyNameFinder.description: Discover the perfect name with AI suggestions.

smartGroceryList.title: Smart Grocery List
smartGroceryList.description: AI-powered shopping list for pregnancy nutrition.

aiHospitalBag.title: AI Hospital Bag
aiHospitalBag.description: Smart packing list for delivery day.

aiPartnerGuide.title: AI Partner Guide
aiPartnerGuide.description: Support tips for partners and spouses.

aiBumpPhotos.title: Weekly Snapshots
aiBumpPhotos.description: Smart pregnancy photo timeline with AI insights.

aiFitnessCoach.title: AI Fitness Coach
aiFitnessCoach.description: Safe exercises customized for your pregnancy stage.

aiBackPainRelief.title: AI Back Pain Relief
aiBackPainRelief.description: Personalized exercises for pregnancy back pain.

aiLaborProgress.title: AI Labor Progress Tracker
aiLaborProgress.description: Track contractions and monitor labor progress.

cycleTracker.title: Cycle & Ovulation Tracker
cycleTracker.description: Track your cycle and find your fertile days.

dueDateCalculator.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDateCalculator.description: Find out when your little one will arrive.

fetalGrowth.title: Fetal Growth Tracker
fetalGrowth.description: See how big your baby is this week!

postpartumMentalHealth.title: Mental Health Coach
postpartumMentalHealth.description: EPDS screening and mental health support.

gestationalDiabetes.title: GDM Risk Assessment
gestationalDiabetes.description: Know your gestational diabetes risk factors.

babyGearRecommender.title: Baby Gear Recommender
babyGearRecommender.description: Essential items checklist for your new arrival.

dueDatePage.title: Due Date Calculator
dueDatePage.subtitle: Estimate when your baby will arrive
dueDatePage.lmpLabel: First Day of Last Menstrual Period
dueDatePage.info: Only about 5% of babies are born on their exact due date. Most are born within 2 weeks before or after. Your healthcare provider may adjust your due date based on ultrasound measurements.

kickCounterPage.title: Kick Counter
kickCounterPage.subtitle: Count 10 kicks to monitor fetal activity
kickCounterPage.goal: Goal: 10 kicks in 2 hours or less
kickCounterPage.info: Starting at 28 weeks, count fetal movements daily. Contact your healthcare provider if you notice decreased movement or don't reach 10 kicks in 2 hours.

contractionPage.title: Contraction Timer
contractionPage.subtitle: Track duration and frequency of contractions
contractionPage.callProviderDesc: Contractions are 5 minutes apart and lasting 45+ seconds. Consider heading to the hospital.
contractionPage.rule511Desc: Call your provider when contractions are 5 minutes apart, lasting 1 minute each, for at least 1 hour.

preeclampsiaPage.title: Preeclampsia Risk Assessment
preeclampsiaPage.subtitle: Check your preeclampsia risk factors
preeclampsiaPage.disclaimer: This is a preliminary assessment only. Always consult your healthcare provider.

fitnessPage.title: AI Fitness Coach
fitnessPage.disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider before starting any exercise program.

forbiddenFoodsPage.title: Foods to Avoid
forbiddenFoodsPage.disclaimer: This is a general guide. Always consult your healthcare provider about dietary restrictions specific to your pregnancy.

nutrition.addFoodFirst: Add at least one food item
nutrition.logMealFirst: Log at least one meal first
nutrition.weekInfo: Week {{week}} - Log your meals and get AI tips
nutrition.tip1: Eat 5-6 small meals instead of 3 large ones
nutrition.tip3: Avoid raw foods and unpasteurized cheeses
nutrition.tip4: Focus on protein, iron, and calcium
